caption: A news broadcast depicts a legislative assembly hall where people are seated in tiered green seats. Many men are present, some wearing white shirts and others in traditional attire, including caps and robes. Some individuals are seen reviewing papers. Overlaid on the bottom of the screen is a news ticker with a purple "NEWS NOW" banner. The main headline reads "JUSUN STRIKE" in bold white letters, followed by a sub-headline that says "REPS URGE FG TO ENSURE SPEEDY RESOLUTION". The right side of the ticker displays the "plustv" logo, and a prompt at the bottom says "Watch us on DSTV CHANNEL 408". Across the frames, the camera pans slowly from left to right, shifting the perspective across the assembly members while the on-screen text and logos remain static.
